element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic learned immediately through play
Pressure gradually increases as stage progresses; blocks rise steadily towards top
Players learn through experimentation that cleared lines cause blocks above to fall and potentially match
Advanced scoring mechanic; incentivizes planning multi-block clears
Core control; described as 'easy new controls' requiring minimal learning
Game speed increases continuously; adaptation required for extended play

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully clearing a row of matching blocks
Creating chain reactions that cascade blocks downward
Earning combos (multiple clears in single action)
Blocks falling below the danger threshold
typical_tension_triggers: Blocks steadily rising toward top of playfield
New blocks generating at bottom with no safe move available
Speed increasing in Endless Mode over time
Blocks touching top of screen (game over condition)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating: gentle, slower early gameplay with learning curve; accelerates as stage/difficulty progresses; described as 'addictive' requiring engagement with combo/chain mechanics for pacing control

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle and slow pacing; easy controls to learn; basic block-matching establishes core mechanic
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Block rise speed increases; players must optimize chain reactions and combos to manage stack height; varying opponent difficulty in Story Mode
difficulty_curve.late_game: Continuous acceleration in Endless Mode; high-speed block generation and rising; requires mastery of chain reactions and rapid cursor control
notable_spikes: Transition from safe early play to sustained block pressure
Speed acceleration checkpoints in Endless Mode
Each new opponent in Story Mode with increased difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Series of computer-controlled opponents with escalating difficulty; players progress through sequence of increasingly challenging AI
Fixed level layout with preset block arrangement; objective to clear all blocks below a 'boundary' line within move limit; non-rising blocks distinguish from other modes
Preset block arrangement solved in exact number of moves; static playfield (no rising mechanic); pure optimization challenge
Continuous play with steadily rising stack; speed increases over time; player survival metric (how long before blocks reach top); no preset objective
Two-minute time limit; maximize points within fixed duration; combines speed with scoring optimization
